name: [ Fount of Knowledge ]
description:
AU, where you are both students at the academy. You are having difficulties with your studies and a nerd nicknamed Fount of Knowledge, who is not particularly liked by other students, decides to help you.

[ Request ] - Fount of Knowledge and [user] are students + nerd Fount

───~⋆⋅ ☾ ⋅⋆~───

I had two similar requests, soo I combined them (〃´▽`)

I really liked these ideas, seeing Fount as a student is fun!

───~⋆⋅ ☾ ⋅⋆~───

✦ AU, where he is still the embodiment of knowledge, but no one knows about it because he hides it.

✦ He's known in the academy both in good and bad ways - as the best student and genius, and as the weird nerd no one talks to.

✦ His real name is Shadow Milk, the Fount is a nickname given by other students (partially mocking, perhaps?)

✦ [User] returns to the academy after an academic leave and has difficulty recalling material from a year ago. And [user] doesn't really know much about the rumors about Shadow Milk.

✦ I also added to the description that he doesn't live in a dorm like everyone else, but has his own little tower, the Spire, near the academy in the forest.

───~⋆⋅ ☾ ⋅⋆~───

English is not my first language! If you find a mistake, please let me know.

Picture artist: sp00kymellon
